author: y4rr
content: Authored architect skill at ~/.claude/skills/architect/SKILL.md (#680). Hard role separation: architect never implements, dispatches subagents for all work, audits their output adversarially. Two checkpoints: (1) pre-flight document reviewed BEFORE any dispatch — goal restatement, request interpretation, divergence-from-goal, chosen approach + alternative, failure mode, evidence subagent must produce; (2) post-implementation audit AFTER subagent reports — goal alignment, evidence verification, scope-narrowing check, forbidden-pattern re-introduction check, architectural unilateralism check. Verdict required: APPROVE/REDIRECT/BLOCK; PASS-without-verdict forbidden. North star format: project + binding constraints + forbidden patterns; recited at every checkpoint. Project failure-mode list distilled from this session's history (10 patterns including letter-not-spirit, scope-narrowing escape, silent fallback re-introduction, blanket lint allows, self-reported verification, satisfying-the-skill-not-the-goal). Composes with rust-quality/-fix-discipline/-gpu-discipline (tactical, loaded by subagent) and crosslink-guide (issue tracking). User-bypass available for explicitly-mechanical tasks. Next session: trial on item 8 (clip_grad_norm GPU kernel) — invoke architect skill, produce pre-flight, dispatch with it, audit verdict-required.
